title: Salota fort
tagline: Salota fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Salota fort is a hill fort in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Salota fort is a hill fort in Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Baglan region of Nashik. It lies close to the Salher fort.

topPlaces.name: Kelzar Dam
topPlaces.description: Kelzar Dam, is an earthfill dam on Aram river near Satana, Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Hargad Fort
topPlaces.description: Hargad Fort is located in the Baglan area of Nashik district. There are two main hill ranges in Baglan area, the Selbari range is south of the Dolbari hill range.

items.note: Kelzar Dam, is an earthfill dam on Aram river near Satana, Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra in India.
Hargad Fort is located in the Baglan area of Nashik district. There are two main hill ranges in Baglan area, the Selbari range is south of the Dolbari hill range.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Salota fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Salota fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Salota fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (123 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Salota fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Salota fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Salota fort?
faq.a: Stays in Salota fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Salota fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kelzar Dam, Hargad Fort.
